posts.caption:
The perfect color is waiting for you.

Tuckerton Lumber carries the full Benjamin Moore line - over 3,500 colors, premium paints, and expert advice from our team. Whether you are refreshing a room or painting the whole beach house, we have got you covered.

Stop by our Tuckerton or Surf City paint store and let us help you find the perfect shade.

Tuckerton Lumber - Your Benjamin Moore headquarters since 1932.
www.tlcnj.com

Thinking about selling your LBI home this spring? The market is moving fast and inventory is tight. Let's talk about what your home is worth today. #KellyLynchRealtor #LBI #RealEstate

Your front door called. It wants an upgrade.

Introducing Reeb Finish Express at Tuckerton Lumber - gorgeous pre-finished Therma-Tru fiberglass entry doors delivered in DAYS, not weeks.

Total Eclipse (black) or Alaskan Storm (white)
10-year warranty
Pre-finished BOTH sides - no painting, no waiting
Multiple styles with coordinated glass and hardware

Summers coming. Your beach house deserves a front door that turns heads.

Tuckerton and Surf City | Since 1932
